headline: Rúben Amorim — update
body: RT @FabrizioRomano: 🚨 Manchester United are set to save over £8/9m in compensation for Rúben Amorim and his staff. Follows agreement done…
text:
RT @FabrizioRomano: 🚨 Manchester United are set to save over £8/9m in compensation for Rúben Amorim and his staff.

Follows agreement done…
